title: Repository implementation audit against specs (spec vs code proof)
summary: Admit full repository implementation audit proving difference between specifications and executable code. Artifacts: IMPLEMENTATION_AUDIT.md, MISSING_FEATURES.md, NEXT_IMPLEMENTATION_PRIORITY.md, IMPLEMENTATION_TRACEABILITY_MATRIX.md. Finding: VPR-2 R3F interaction + JSON domain stores are IMPLEMENTED; GLB admit gate tooling is PARTIAL/VERIFIED offline only; open-source scan/vPIC/Open3D/mobile backlog is NOT STARTED with zero production code; DT-D063 GLB binary NOT_ACQUIRED. Rule: documentation alone does not count as implementation.
